 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.1","title":"Implement unit tests for pattern matching","description":"## Task
Write comprehensive unit tests for the pattern matching engine.

## Test Categories

### Pattern Matching Tests
- Test each default pattern matches expected commands
- Test case insensitivity
- Test negative lookahead patterns
- Test regex edge cases

### Command Normalization Tests
- sudo stripping: "sudo rm -rf" → "rm -rf"
- env stripping: "env FOO=bar kubectl" → "kubectl"
- Multiple wrappers: "sudo env FOO=bar rm" → "rm"
- Compound commands: "cd /etc && rm -rf *"
- Subshells: "$(rm -rf /)"
- Pipes: "echo | rm -rf"

### Tier Classification Tests
- SAFE patterns skip review
- CRITICAL patterns require 2+ approvals
- DANGEROUS patterns require 1 approval
- CAUTION patterns auto-approve
- No match allows without review

### Path Resolution Tests
- Relative paths expanded: "./build" → "/full/path/build"
- Parent traversal: "../secrets" → resolved path
- Home expansion: "~/" → full home path

### Edge Cases
- Empty command
- Whitespace-only command
- Very long commands
- Unicode in paths
- Quotes in commands

## Test Structure
Use table-driven tests for comprehensive coverage.

## Files
- internal/core/patterns_test.go
- internal/core/normalize_test.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All default patterns have test coverage
- [ ] Normalization handles all wrapper types
- [ ] Path resolution tests pass
- [ ] Edge cases covered
- [ ] Tests run in CI","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownLake","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:56.662520711-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T20:15:34.730622391-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T20:15:34.730622391-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.1","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:56.663439943-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.1","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:56.664289275-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.2","title":"Implement unit tests for state machine transitions","description":"## Task
Write comprehensive unit tests for the request state machine.

## Test Categories

### Valid Transitions
- (new) → PENDING
- PENDING → APPROVED (enough approvals)
- PENDING → REJECTED (any rejection)
- PENDING → CANCELLED (requestor cancels)
- PENDING → TIMEOUT (expiry reached)
- TIMEOUT → ESCALATED (human notified)
- APPROVED → EXECUTING
- APPROVED → CANCELLED
- EXECUTING → EXECUTED
- EXECUTING → EXECUTION_FAILED
- EXECUTING → TIMED_OUT

### Invalid Transitions
- PENDING → EXECUTED (must go through APPROVED)
- APPROVED → APPROVED (no re-approval)
- EXECUTED → PENDING (terminal state)
- REJECTED → APPROVED (terminal state)
- Any → CREATED (only initial state)

### Terminal State Tests
- EXECUTED is terminal
- EXECUTION_FAILED is terminal
- TIMED_OUT is terminal
- REJECTED is terminal
- CANCELLED is terminal

### Timestamp Tests
- created_at set on creation
- resolved_at set on terminal transitions
- approval_expires_at set on APPROVED transition

### Edge Cases
- Transition to same state
- Transition from nil/empty state
- Concurrent transitions

## Test Structure
Table-driven tests with from/to/expected outcome.

## Files
- internal/core/statemachine_test.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All valid transitions tested
- [ ] Invalid transitions rejected
- [ ] Terminal states correctly identified
- [ ] Timestamps set correctly
- [ ] Tests run in CI","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:21:12.081684073-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:45:13.918025656-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:45:13.918025656-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.2","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-3s8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:21:12.082674508-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.3","title":"Implement Git history repository for audit trail","description":"## Task
Implement optional Git repository for audit trail of all slb activity.

## Purpose
Separate Git repo that stores complete history of:
- All requests (approved, rejected, cancelled)
- All reviews with signatures
- Execution outcomes
- Pattern changes

This provides:
- Permanent audit trail
- Easy grep/search through history
- Shareable across team
- Backup of decision-making

## Repository Structure
.slb-history/
├── .git/
├── requests/
│   └── 2025/
│       └── 12/
│           └── req-abc123.json
├── reviews/
│   └── 2025/
│       └── 12/
│           └── rev-def456.json
├── executions/
│   └── 2025/
│       └── 12/
│           └── exec-ghi789.json
└── patterns/
    └── changes.jsonl

## Functions (internal/git/history.go)

### InitHistoryRepo(path string) error
- Initialize Git repo at path
- Create directory structure

### CommitRequest(req *Request) error
- Write request JSON
- Git add and commit
- Commit message: "Request: <command truncated>"

### CommitReview(rev *Review) error
- Write review JSON
- Git add and commit
- Commit message: "Review: <decision> for <request-id>"

### CommitExecution(exec *Execution) error
- Write execution JSON
- Git add and commit

## Configuration
[history]
git_repo_path = "~/.slb/history"
auto_git_commit = true
retention_days = 365

## Files
- internal/git/history.go
- internal/git/repo.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Repo initializes correctly
- [ ] Commits created on events
- [ ] Searchable history
- [ ] Configurable path","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownLake","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:25:53.585586833-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T20:22:12.194900375-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T20:22:12.194900375-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.3","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-3s8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:25:53.586592897-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.3","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-jrn.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:25:53.587502141-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.4","title":"Implement integration tests for full workflow","description":"## Task
Write integration tests that cover the full request→approve→execute workflow.

## Test Scenarios

### Happy Path
1. Initialize slb (slb init)
2. Start session A (requestor)
3. Start session B (reviewer)
4. Session A: slb request "rm -rf ./test-dir"
5. Session B: slb approve <request-id>
6. Session A: slb execute <request-id>
7. Verify execution success
8. Check audit trail

### Rejection Path
1. Create request
2. Reject request
3. Verify state is REJECTED
4. Verify cannot execute

### Timeout Path
1. Create request with short timeout
2. Wait for timeout
3. Verify state is TIMEOUT
4. Verify escalation

### Self-Approval Prevention
1. Create request
2. Try to approve own request
3. Verify rejection with error

### Rate Limiting
1. Create 6 pending requests
2. Verify 6th is rejected (max 5)

### Daemon Integration
1. Start daemon
2. Create request
3. Verify notification sent
4. Approve via watch
5. Stop daemon

## Test Infrastructure
- Use temp directories
- Cleanup after each test
- Parallel test execution
- CI integration

## Files
- tests/integration/workflow_test.go
- tests/integration/daemon_test.go
- tests/integration/helpers.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Happy path passes
- [ ] Edge cases covered
- [ ] Tests run in CI
- [ ] Cleanup works
- [ ] Parallel safe","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:19.118525499-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:19.118525499-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.4","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:19.119497109-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js.4","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-f4c.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:19.120482805-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","title":"EPIC: CLI Command Suite","description":"## Overview
Implement all CLI commands using Cobra, with consistent JSON output and beautiful colorized help.

## Background & Rationale
The CLI is agent-first. Every command supports --json for structured output. The TUI is the ONLY human-facing interactive interface. The CLI is designed for programmatic consumption.

## Key Design Principles
1. **JSON Output Contract**: All keys snake_case, timestamps RFC3339 UTC
2. **Human-friendly to stderr**: Colored output goes to stderr
3. **Machine JSON to stdout**: Structured data for parsing
4. **NDJSON for Streaming**: slb watch outputs one JSON object per line
5. **Short Flags**: -s/--session-id, -j/--json, -C/--project

## Command Categories

### Initialization
- `slb init [--force]` → create .slb/ structure
- `slb version [--json]` → version, build info, config paths

### Session (see Session epic)
- session start/end/resume/list/heartbeat/reset-limits

### Request/Run (see Request epic)
- run, request, status, pending, cancel

### Review (see Review epic)
- review, approve, reject

### Execute (see Execute epic)
- execute, emergency-execute, rollback

### History & Search
- `slb history [--query "..."] [--status <s>] [--agent <n>] [--since <d>]`
- `slb show <request-id>` → detailed view

### Configuration
- `slb config [--global | --project]`
- `slb config get/set <key> [<value>]`
- `slb config edit` → opens in $EDITOR

### Patterns (see Patterns epic)
- patterns list/test/add/remove/request-removal/suggest

### Quick Reference Card
- `slb` (no args) → prints colorful quick reference with lipgloss styling

## Files
- internal/cli/root.go (root command, quick reference)
- internal/cli/help.go (colorized help)
- One file per command group
- internal/output/json.go, table.go, format.go

## Success Criteria
1. All commands have --json mode
2. Quick reference card renders beautifully
3. Tab completion works (zsh, bash, fish)
4. Help text is clear and colorized
5. Error messages are actionable","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.084599458-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.084599458-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-v0z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.086182396-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-399","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.087162823-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-qr8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.088078589-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-3s8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.088961313-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-jrn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.089922072-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-kb5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:13:34.090841275-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.1","title":"Implement slb init command","description":"## Task
Implement the project initialization command.

## Command: slb init [--force]

### What it creates

Directory structure:
.slb/
├── state.db                    # SQLite database (WAL mode)
├── logs/                       # Execution output logs
├── pending/                    # Materialized JSON snapshots
├── sessions/                   # Active agent sessions
├── rollback/                   # Captured state for rollback
├── processed/                  # Recently processed requests
└── config.toml                 # Project-specific config

### Logic
1. Check if .slb/ already exists
   - Without --force: error "Already initialized"
   - With --force: reinitialize (preserves data)
2. Create directory structure
3. Initialize SQLite database with schema
4. Create default config.toml
5. Add .slb/ to .gitignore if not present
6. Output success message

### Default config.toml
Generate with sensible defaults and comments explaining each option.

### .gitignore addition
Append to existing .gitignore or create new:
```
# slb state (don't commit pending requests)
.slb/
```

## Files
- internal/cli/init.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Creates all directories
- [ ] Initializes SQLite with schema
- [ ] Creates default config
- [ ] Updates .gitignore
- [ ] --force allows reinitialize
- [ ] JSON output: { initialized_at, project_path }","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:26.11762921-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-16T21:13:01.056418459-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-16T21:13:01.056418459-06:00","close_reason":"Implemented slb init command with full test suite (10 tests pass)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.1","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-v0z.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:26.118581243-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.1","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-f5d.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:26.119399537-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.1","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-1c3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:26.120235324-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.2","title":"Implement JSON output formatting utilities","description":"## Task
Implement consistent JSON output formatting for all CLI commands.

## Key Contract (from plan)
- All JSON keys are snake_case (no camelCase)
- Timestamps are RFC3339 UTC (e.g., 2025-12-13T14:32:05Z)
- Human-friendly output to stderr
- Machine JSON to stdout
- Streaming commands use NDJSON (one JSON per line)

## Functions (internal/output/)

### output/format.go
- IsJSON() bool - check if --json flag set
- SetOutputMode(json bool) - configure mode
- GetOutputMode() OutputMode

### output/json.go
- OutputJSON(v any) error
  - Marshal to stdout with proper formatting
  - Handle nil values
- OutputNDJSON(v any) error
  - Single line JSON for streaming
- OutputJSONError(err error, code int) error
  - Structured error output

### output/table.go
- OutputTable(headers []string, rows [][]string)
  - go-pretty table formatting
  - Colorized based on content type
- OutputList(items []string)
  - Simple list formatting

### Error JSON Format
{
  "error": "error_code",
  "message": "Human readable message",
  "details": { ... }
}

## Files
- internal/output/format.go
- internal/output/json.go
- internal/output/table.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All JSON uses snake_case
- [ ] Timestamps are RFC3339 UTC
- [ ] Human output to stderr
- [ ] JSON output to stdout
- [ ] Error format consistent","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:41.337199768-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:59:45.19009041-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:59:45.19009041-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.2","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-f5d.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:41.33830165-06:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.2","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-v0z.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:20:41.339241431-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.3","title":"Implement graceful degradation when daemon unavailable","description":"## Task
Ensure slb CLI works even when daemon is not running, with clear messaging.

## Background (from plan)
Commands should check daemon status before requiring it. When daemon is unavailable:
- Request still works, just without real-time features
- Clear warning shown to user
- File-based polling fallback

## What Works Without Daemon
- slb init, version, config
- slb session start/end/list
- slb request (creates request file, no notifications)
- slb pending, review, approve, reject
- slb execute
- slb patterns *
- slb history, show

## What Degrades Without Daemon
- slb watch → falls back to file polling
- slb tui → works but no real-time updates
- Desktop notifications disabled
- Agent Mail notifications disabled
- Fast IPC unavailable (file polling instead)

## Functions (internal/daemon/client.go)

### IsDaemonRunning() bool
- Check PID file exists
- Verify process is alive (kill -0)
- Try to connect to IPC socket

### WithDaemonOrFallback(fn func(), fallback func())
- If daemon running: call fn
- Else: show warning, call fallback

### Common Warning Message
"Warning: slb daemon not running. Some features disabled.
Start daemon with: slb daemon start
Continuing with file-based polling..."

## Implementation Points
1. Check daemon status at start of relevant commands
2. If unavailable, log warning to stderr
3. Continue with degraded functionality
4. Never fail hard just because daemon is down

## Files
- internal/daemon/client.go
- Modifications to relevant CLI commands

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All core commands work without daemon
- [ ] Clear warning messages shown
- [ ] File-based fallback works
- [ ] No hard failures due to missing daemon
- [ ] slb watch polls files when no daemon","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:33:02.223231857-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:57:02.573114807-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:57:02.573114807-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7wh.3","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-f4c.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:33:02.224207314-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
